**How it was tested**
- [ ] Server starts and all default resources load
- [ ] One client can join, spawn, and move
- [ ] Two clients can play together (ping visible, chat works, no protocol errors)
- [ ] `openports` does not crash
- [ ] Changes stay inside `Server/net/`, `Client/net/`, `Shared/net/`, `vendor/enet/`
